content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Cat
description: Legendary Hyperion class mod for Maya the Siren, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Accelerate, Mind's Eye, Wreck, Foresight, Reaper. Boosts SMG damage heavily at the cost of accuracy.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +142.5% SMG damage, -40% SMG accuracy. Possible skill bonuses (up to +5): Mind's Eye, Wreck, Accelerate, Reaper, Foresight.
special.title: Rawr.
